headline: Wall Street Analysts Predict a 35.12% Upside in Tyler Technologies (TYL): Here's  What You Should Know
summary: The consensus price target hints at a 35.1% upside potential for Tyler Technologies (TYL). While empirical research shows that this sought-after metric is hardly effective, an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean that the stock will witness an upside in the near term.

headline: Tyler Technologies to Participate in August and September Investor Conferences
